business.name: Halo Air Heating & Cooling Ltd.
business._addressNote: Owner runs out of a home office and asked that the street address NEVER appear on the public site, in JSON-LD, or in any rendered UI. Only city/region/country are kept here and consumed by the service-area-only schema in src/lib/schema.ts. Do not re-introduce street/postalCode fields.

geo._note: Edmonton city centroid — used only for the schema's areaServed centre. We intentionally do NOT publish the home-office street coordinates.

business._ratingNote: Set to { value: number, count: number } once client Google account access is granted and reviews are verified. Until then this stays null and the AggregateRating JSON-LD block is suppressed (embedding unverified rating data violates Google's structured-data policy).
business._yearsExperienceNote: Owner's HVAC industry experience (not company age). Halo Air Heating & Cooling Ltd. was incorporated March 2026; presenting '15 years experience' is accurate while 'in business since 2020' would not be. Do not display 'founded year' anywhere — use yearsExperience for copy only.

_hoursNote: Client confirmed 8am–5pm weekdays, weekends preferably off. After-hours service is available on request (email or phone), NOT a 24/7 staffed emergency line. Do not advertise '24/7' or 'always open' anywhere on the site or in schema.
_serviceCategoriesNote: Nested category-based service hierarchy. Each top-level entry in serviceCategories becomes a /services/[category] landing page; each entry under `.services` becomes /services/[category]/[slug]. Sub-service slugs MUST be unique across categories (used as the URL leaf). Booking form renders these as <optgroup>s. standaloneServices map to top-level /services/[slug] pages — currently only after-hours.

heating.label: Heating
heating.description: Furnace repair, installation, and maintenance — plus gas work on every job.

furnace-repair.label: Furnace Repair
furnace-repair.short: Same-week diagnosis and repair for residential furnaces — all major brands.

furnace-installation.label: Furnace Installation
furnace-installation.short: High-efficiency furnace replacement, right-sized to your home. Free estimate.

furnace-maintenance.label: Furnace Maintenance
furnace-maintenance.short: Annual fall tune-ups that preserve your warranty and prevent winter breakdowns.

cooling.label: Cooling
cooling.description: AC repair, installation, and seasonal maintenance for Edmonton summers.

ac-repair.label: AC Repair
ac-repair.short: Fast diagnosis and repair for residential and light-commercial cooling.

ac-installation.label: AC Installation
ac-installation.short: New central AC installs sized to your home. Free written estimate.

ac-maintenance.label: AC Maintenance
ac-maintenance.short: Spring tune-ups that catch problems before the first heat wave.

water.label: Water Heaters
water.description: Tank and tankless water heater repair, installation, and maintenance — Red Seal Plumber + Gasfitter on every job.

water-heater-repair.label: Water Heater Repair
water-heater-repair.short: Tank and tankless repairs — leaks, no hot water, lukewarm output, error codes.

water-heater-installation.label: Water Heater Installation
water-heater-installation.short: New tank installs sized to your household. Free estimate, gas + venting included.

tankless-water-heaters.label: Tankless Water Heaters
tankless-water-heaters.short: On-demand hot water — endless supply, longer lifespan, no standby losses.

after-hours.label: After-Hours Service
after-hours.short: After-hours service for no-heat and no-cool situations — available by request via phone or email.

trustSignals._awardNote: Owner is a multi-award-winning HVAC technician (President's Award 2020 and Right-Time Award 2023, earned at prior employers). Per client decision, the site uses generic 'award-winning' language and does NOT name the previous employers.
guarantees: Upfront pricing — call for a quote, no surprises
Award-winning technician with 15 years of HVAC experience
